content:
## Architecture

### Crate placement

All RAG logic lives in `corvia-kernel`. Server layer (`corvia-server`) adds thin REST/MCP endpoints. Python SDK (M5) gets RAG for free via PyO3.


### New files

```
crates/corvia-kernel/src/
  rag_pipeline.rs       — RagPipeline struct, context()/ask() orchestration
  retriever.rs          — Retriever trait + VectorRetriever + GraphExpandRetriever
  augmenter.rs          — Augmenter trait + StructuredAugmenter + TokenEstimator
  rag_types.rs          — RetrievalOpts, TokenBudget, PipelineTrace, RagResponse, etc.

crates/corvia-common/src/
  config.rs             — add RagConfig section

crates/corvia-server/src/
  rest.rs               — add POST /v1/context, POST /v1/ask; fix search routing
  mcp.rs                — add corvia_context, corvia_ask tools; fix search routing
```
